title: Trump threatens Iran: entire country could be taken out in one night
snippet: President Trump on Iran: 'The entire country could be taken out in one night, and that night might be tomorrow night.' Military preparing strikes on energy targets. Deadline 8 PM ET Tuesday.

title: US military preparing potential strikes on Iran energy infrastructure
snippet: US military preparing for potential strikes on energy targets in Iran. Trump sets final deadline of 8 PM ET Tuesday for peace deal (WSJ). Planners preparing target lists.

title: Iran officially rejected US ceasefire proposal
snippet: Iran has officially rejected the US ceasefire proposal, per Athena Daily. Iranian state media said Tehran rejected latest ceasefire proposal and wants permanent end to the war.

title: Iran 10-point response describes maximalist demands
snippet: Iran submitted 10-point response to US plan. Includes end to conflicts in region, protocol for safe passage through Strait of Hormuz, lifting sanctions, reconstruction. Senior US official calls it maximalist.

title: Trump wants to seize Iran oil
snippet: Trump says he wants to seize Iran's oil. 'It's there for the taking. There's not a thing they could do about it.'

title: Netanyahu urged Trump not to pursue ceasefire
snippet: Axios: Netanyahu told Trump not to pursue a ceasefire with Iran. Israeli official revealed that amid US deadline for Iran by Tuesday evening, Netanyahu urged Trump not to agree to ceasefire.

title: Iran IRGC: Strait of Hormuz will never return to former state
snippet: Iran's IRGC says the Strait of Hormuz will never return to its former state following major regional shifts.

title: Polymarket whale bets $6K against ceasefire by April 15
snippet: Whale bet $6,071 on NO for US x Iran ceasefire by April 15 at $0.85. Market shows 14% YES. Previous whale nailed exact start date of Iran operation.

title: Iranian oil now more expensive than Brent crude
snippet: Iranian Light crude trading at +$1/barrel premium vs Brent, first time since May 2022. Sharp reversal from -$10/barrel discount. Iran benefits from regional oil flow disruptions.

title: Oil above $115/barrel, CPI inflation to rise to 3.7% in 7 weeks
snippet: Oil prices crossing above $115/barrel in US. If sustained 7 more weeks, US CPI will rise to ~3.7%, highest since Sept 2023. Americans spent $240M/day extra on fuel since war began.

title: Trump considers charging tolls for ships through Strait of Hormuz
snippet: President Trump considers charging tolls for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Growing optimism Hormuz blockade thawing
snippet: Growing optimism that Hormuz blockade starting to thaw somewhat: odds that 60+ ships will cross Strait have doubled overnight on Polymarket.

title: Retail investor fear at 20-year high
snippet: ROBO Put/Call Ratio at 1.0, highest in at least 20 years. Ratio has DOUBLED since December. Previous high 0.95 during 2020 pandemic. Even 2008 crisis saw lower high of 0.91.

title: Jamie Dimon warns Iran war could drive inflation higher
snippet: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon says Iran war could drive inflation higher and push financial markets down further.

title: US and Iran discussing 45-day ceasefire
snippet: US, Iran, regional mediators discussing potential 45-day ceasefire that could lead to permanent end. White House: just one of many ideas, Trump has not signed off. Iran also rejected it.

title: Gold trading volume exceeds Treasury Bills
snippet: Gold trading volume averaged ~$361 billion/day in 2025, nearly triple 2021 levels. Gold OTC volume exceeds Treasury Bills ($186B), EUR/GBP ($169B), Dow Jones (~$100B).

title: Iran war will throttle oil flows even if Hormuz reopens
snippet: Iran war will continue to disrupt global oil supplies even if a ceasefire leads to swift reopening of Strait of Hormuz, per CBS analysis.

title: US pushing harder for ceasefire than Iran
snippet: Pakistani Sources: US pushing harder for ceasefire deal than Iran. Haaretz reports Washington showing more urgency. Iran believes it has secured strategic advantage. US holding firm on 15 demands including halting uranium enrichment.
